description: Bundled XRD Bragg-peak detector algorithms (flat library). These are Phase-1 (per-bin) detectors run by 'xrd-app peaks'; cross-bin linking + shape filtering is the separate 'shapes' stage. Algorithm names carry the bin size they were developed on (CVEvolve session). holdout_f1/holdout_f2 are that session's holdout scores (null = unscored). bin_size null = applies to any binned size. Per-frame combined (peak+shape) algorithms live in the CombinedAlgorithms/ library. Automated (CVEvolve) algorithms live in their own named sub-folder.
metric: holdout_f1 / holdout_f2 (spatially-validated holdout score; higher is better)

detectors.name: baseline
detectors.notes: Binned baseline: radial background subtraction + percentile threshold + connected components. Generic reference, runs on any binned size.

detectors.name: 5x5_tophat_band_adaptive_snr
detectors.notes: Developed on 5x5 (CVEvolve). Kept the variant computing integrated_intensity; runs on any binned size.
